title: Conduct & Rules
description: Written and unwritten rules at the workplace

lessons.title: Chewing Gum & Perfume – Not Allowed in Production

sections.text: It has been observed that chewing gum and perfume are being used in production. This is not permitted in accordance with the company's hygiene rules.

sections.title: The following is strictly prohibited in production areas:

sections.text: All employees must comply with these rules without exception!

lessons.title: Important Hygiene Information – Wash Your Hands

sections.text: Hygiene deviations have been detected on the production lines. Wash your hands thoroughly. Follow the hygiene rules carefully.

sections.title: How to wash your hands correctly:

sections.text: Tests will be carried out in the airlock area next week.

sections.title: Your responsibility:
items: 🤝 Take responsibility – kindly remind your colleagues if you see rule violations
🐟 We produce food – QUALITY and HYGIENE ARE ESSENTIAL!

sections.title: Mandatory – Must be used in production

sections.text: All employees MUST follow these rules. Violations can lead to contamination of our products.

sections.title: Follow these 8 steps every time you enter production:

animatedSteps.title: Wash hands
animatedSteps.description: Use your elbow to operate the soap dispenser

animatedSteps.title: Dry hands
animatedSteps.description: Use paper towel to dry thoroughly

animatedSteps.title: Disinfect hands
animatedSteps.description: Use your elbow to operate the dispenser

animatedSteps.title: Beard net
animatedSteps.description: Put on a disposable beard net if needed

animatedSteps.title: All hair covered
animatedSteps.description: Make sure all hair is covered under the cap

animatedSteps.title: No jewellery
animatedSteps.description: No jewellery, no watch, short and clean fingernails

sections.text: All employees with a key tag or registered at the facility must follow these rules:

sections.title: Key tag rules:
items: You may not lend your key tag to others – it is personal
You may not let other people into the facility
People without their own access pass must register at the main entrance and reception
If you have forgotten or lost your key, notify Andrea – for security reasons and registration in Capitech

sections.text: Failure to follow this rule is grounds for a warning or termination.

lessons.title: Drive Safely to and from Rindarøya

sections.text: Vikenco has received complaints from our neighbours regarding unsafe and irresponsible driving on the route to and from Rindarøya.

sections.title: Important to remember:
items: ⚠️ There is no pavement/sidewalk on this route
👶 Both children and elderly people walk along the road
🚦 Follow traffic rules and adapt your speed to road and weather conditions
🤝 Be extra attentive and responsible when driving to and from Rindarøya

sections.text: Let us all work together for our own and others' safety, to ensure safe travel and maintain a good reputation for our company.
